CVE-2025-29480.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in gdal 3.10.2 allows a local attac ...
CVE-2025-29480.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in gdal 3.10.2 allows a local attacker to cause a denial of service via the OGRSpatialReference::Release function. NOTE: the Supplier indicates that the report is invalid and could not be reproduced.
